audit_result.proof_trace: Data columns from Engine API are discarded: processBlock hardcodes Opt.none(DataColumnSidecars) at line 896 instead of passing entry.columns to storeBlock, causing API-sourced columns to skip gossip validation (validateDataColumnSidecar) that gossip-sourced columns receive.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Validator imports block with malformed data columns via Engine API; columns bypass KZG proof verification and inclusion proof checks that gossip path enforces, causing incorrect blob availability tracking and potential consensus divergence.

PROP-6a4369e9-post-003.text: After distributed blob publishing, imported columns must behave as if received via gossip.
PROP-6a4369e9-post-003.assertion: forall col from EL: imported(col) => treated_as_gossip(col) == true
